---
id: tween-rotation
title: "Tween an entity's rotation to a target value"
description: "Smoothly animate an entity's rotation over a specified duration using an easing function. Optionally wait for the animation to complete before returning."
sidebar_label: "Tween an entity's rotation to a target value"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Tween an entity's rotation to a target value"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/entities/{entity_id}/tween/rotation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Smoothly animate an entity's rotation over a specified duration using an easing function. Optionally wait for the animation to complete before returning.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
